reviews.review_description: I wish it was more casual player friendly. I often play few minutes and losing some of the progress when quitting is discouraging. I wish I could start the game not from ship selection but last state of game.
Trust the other reviews, this is truly one of the good games. Its worth every penny

I haven’t found many VR games I love yet (for Oculus Go), but this one is really fun! It takes a little time to understand and I’m still learning, but that shows the depth of the game. I haven’t figured out how to use the magic spells for example. Great game and it would be awesome if the meeting cabin room (map rooms) changed each time you upgraded boats. Great work on this game!!
Love this game. Super fun

One thing I don’t like when you done,and you shut off the game and the next day you go back all the gold the food the gun powder everything gone and you start from the beginning. They should change that when you shut off the game and you go back you continue from where you stop with the gold you collect the food you collect with the guns everything. I understand when you lose then you lose everything but not when you shut off the game to lose everything.that’s not fair you spent hours to play with strategy to lose everything like that. But it’s very good game I love it that’s why I put 4 stars.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and letting us know what you think about the game. This specific game feature was a design choice on our part. That being said, we take all feedback into consideration and we will keep this in mind for the future. It's very valuable to us to hear what our players would like to see in the game!

reviews.review_description: The Devs did a wonderful job on this game. It's challenging fun and keeps you playing. It's a game to keep coming back to but it can be very difficult to keep up with everything going on at time. Maybe adjust the difficulty give us an easy normal And hard mode. Pretty perfect otherwise. Hence 5 stars fro. Me. 😃

This game is almost fun. The game plan action is pretty cool, but one runs had a food so quickly that it ends up being ,really ,really, really annoying. if we either got more gold or used less food the mechanics would be better balanced and the game would be a lot more fun.

This looks like a really simple game but it takes a lot of skill and resource management to play properly. It's pretty addictive and I've had a lot of fun swashing my buckle at pirates. Well made and lovely to play, great work by the team behind it.
Id love to see this game on quest 2
Good game, bit learning curve too steep.

I really like this game. It's s lot of fun to play. The graphics are done really well. It's very creative in the way they laid it out and how it works. It's not too easy or too hard, but keeps your wanting to come back.
I was suspect at so many five-star reviews, but they are warranted! Great game and I will keep playing. Recommend.

OK here’s the scoop on this pretty awesome game. Number one I cannot imagine the coding that went into this game the animation the technical techniques. The thought out storyline the amazing graphics to make it move the way that it does is nothing short of amazing. I had to change my vote from three stars to five stars. Of course there’s a few things I do not like about this game the main thing being you cannot save your game every time you load it you have to start a new game from scratch and that is not good after what you will have to go through to advance. The game is very difficult there are so many things against you the worst thing is the?‘s in the water and increment weather.￼￼￼ on top of that you have pirates always attacking you. And then you run into the port not having the fire power that you actually need to advance or beat another ship. There are tasks that are not clear that you must complete to advance to another ship a better ship. I like the animated part when you get to The shield with the cross blades its as if you’re in a cartoon at the same time it gives you the feeling of what it must have been Mike back in pirate days men coming at you from every direction and you have to fight them off. One of the things I do not like is the amount of money they give you once you win I think it should’ve been at least 100 instead of $43. Or 43 gold pieces. I did get to beat captain Renard but it is by far no easy task. I’ve played this game every single day for over a month and just found out how to beat that ship but once you advance there’s bigger brighter stronger ships that you’ll have to conquer. I highly suggest this game to anyone that likes extreme strategy with little on your side, I think the game was designed this way but sometimes after getting ready to win you lose. The good thing is it is an exciting game and you do have fun so go play this game with a light heart because there will be times that you get extremely frustrated and wonder why the developers put so many obstacles in your way. Thank you for a good game no thank you for all the obstacles. Good luck Maties RRR!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We think there might have been a misunderstanding about the game so we hope this will explain it better: To unlock some ships you need to fulfill certain goals and gather XP. Only gathering XP isn't enough. To check the requirements for each ship, check the info box by each ship. Regarding the LoneWolf: The idea with the ships is to provide different kinds of challenges. This ship has a bit better equipment but the trade-off is that you only have one captain from start. It's absolutely possible to succeed regardless if you can get hold of a crew early on. If you have any other questions, please feel free to send us an email att support@resolutiongames.com

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. You need strategy combined with luck to make a totally absorbing VR game.
This is by far the best game on the go. Well worth the money.

It can be challenging to stay afloat after a few skirmishes but that’s how the game is designed, and I’ve learned to love the concept. Excellent game and really solid graphics! Crazy details btw. Beautiful really.
Really fun game so far.  Lots of options.  Excellent gameplay.  Worth it for sure!
It pains me to write this because Narrows is quite a well polished and thought out game. It feels less like a VR title and more of a mobile port. Give me some epic sailing views!

reviews.review_title: This is a good “pirate” strategy game.
reviews.review_description:
This was a pretty entertaining pirate game. It was fun getting to pick out your ship and sail the seas is search for loot or battle. However I didn’t know how much this game is based on strategy. This is not an ordinary pirate fighting game, this is a strategy game that can get kinda hard. You have to monitor at all times how much food, ammunition, and health you have. Sailing takes up food quickly. Also you’re crew is always getting sick so you have to weigh out the pros and cons when you find a mysterious item because it could make someone sick. But I enjoyed it, especially the times that you’re able to get on the edge of you’re ship in first person and wack pirates with a sword. I would recommend this game to anyone that’s not afraid of THINKING. Overall well done, Resolution games really do make some of the best. 
Thanks, lightning7765.

reviews.review_title: It’s Okay. Could be much better.
reviews.review_description: The game initially is fun, but you soon learn it goes in circles. Battles with some ships are impossible to win and it is extremely difficult if not impossible to level up ships. The best part of the game is the sparring and you don’t get the opportunity to do it much. I wish there was a mode where you could just go from point to point sparring. The rest is quite boring as I don’t enjoy being in a lose lose situation. Please update game with some fun sparring. Thanks

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback! We'll make sure to keep this in mind for the future.
